description: Paper-trading track record — 100% SIMULATED. No real money, no wallet, no keys. Prices via the assistant's WebSearch (no user API keys used).

rules.marking: each 'go', open positions are marked to current prices; realized on close
rules.caveat: WebSearch prices carry meaningful source noise (±3% typical, more for thinly-aggregated names); only multi-day moves are signal, not intraday marks

weekly_basket.thesis: 3-coin research basket to test the week's picks (see chat). Backdrop is unfavorable: Bitcoin Season (Alt Season Index 39/100), so this is swimming upstream.

open_positions.name: Pudgy Penguins
open_positions.thesis: Mean-reversion: top-3 Solana meme with brand/IP, below all EMAs with RSI ~44 (oversold, not overbought). Bounces hard if a meme rotation confirms.
open_positions.kill_risk: Below all EMAs = active downtrend; catching a falling knife.

open_positions.name: Bonk
open_positions.thesis: Lowest-variance way to play a possible meme rotation: deepest-liquidity Solana meme; Solana DEX volume +40% on the week, Pump.fun at ATH.
open_positions.kill_risk: Meme season unconfirmed; huge supply needs real inflows to move.

open_positions.name: Injective
open_positions.thesis: Cleaner structure: constructive pullback, full supply circulating (no unlock dump), perp-DEX/on-chain-finance narrative. Measured, not a moonshot.
open_positions.kill_risk: Alt in Bitcoin Season; needs BTC to cooperate. Wide quote dispersion at entry (~±15%).

closed_trades.note: Marked with ~no elapsed time; within source noise.

history_note: Go #3 (2026-06-01): opened weekly basket PENGU @0.00725, BONK @0.000005501, INJ @7.15 ($1000 each). Review ~2026-06-08.
